title: yabam #2992
definition:
1) (Piel) to perform levirate marriage, perform the duty of a
    brother-in-law
    1a) the duty due to a brother who died childless - to marry his
        widow and have a son for his name
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) (Piel) to perform levirate marriage, perform the duty of a
    brother-in-law
    1a) the duty due to a brother who died childless - to marry his
        widow and have a son for his name

    NASB:  to perform the duty of a husbands brother
